creator: rkoberman@gmail.com
text:
Just to confirm that moving clutter-gtk-1.0 to before clutter-1.0 does make totem build successfully. htre resulting image rund properly, at least in  quick test.

The issue of confused header files, usually in the ordering is really getting to be a pain and, since poudriere always builds ports in a "virgin" environment, it fails to catch those issues which only show up when other ports are installed.

Thanks, John!
